case_title: ANNE DRURY VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-28-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-25-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
